student_verification.name: student
student_verification.declaration: I used Claude to help structure and phrase my explanation of the paper's method. All step descriptions, paper references, and the final summary reflect my own reading of the paper. I verified every section number and table reference against the actual paper.

interactions.prompt: so i submitted this paper https://aclanthology.org/W11-0705.pdf for part a and now i need to do task 1.1 which is describing the core contribution step by step from input to output referencing sections and equations...can you help me write it
interactions.response_summary: Generated a full step-by-step breakdown of the paper's method from raw tweet input to sentiment label output, with references to each section and table.

interactions.prompt: check the task 1.1 i have written the explanation and suggest any improvements if needed it satisfy the requirements
interactions.response_summary: Reviewed the draft against the rubric and identified three issues: Step 1 missing Stanford tokenizer detail, Step 5 had an unsupported claim about RBF/linear kernel, and Step 4A missing explanation for the last one-third window.

interactions.prompt: can you help me do these changes
interactions.response_summary: Applied the three fixes directly to the notebook file.
